SEARCH

Uses of Class
com.nib.commons.exceptions.ContextException

Packages that use ContextException
Package
Description
com.nib.commons
Common utilities and core runtime components for the NIB application framework.
com.nib.commons.esql
API classes for Embedded SQL (E/SQL) integration and runtime support.
com.nib.commons.exceptions
Contains exception classes used throughout the NIB Commons library.
com.nib.scripting
NIB scripting framework.
com.nib.scripting.utils
NIB Batch utilities
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.exceptions
Exceptions for Supernaut online errors.
com.nib.supernaut.security
Security and authentication services for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.systran
System transactions for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.tcp
TCP/IP socket communication support for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.terminal
General terminal control and emulation handling for Supernaut.
com.nib.utilities.api.le
Language Environment (LE) API utilities.

  • Uses of ContextException in com.nib.commons

    Methods in com.nib.commons that throw ContextException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    Context.call(NChar name, AbstractNField... args)
     
    int
    Context.call(NChar name, Object... args)
     
    int
    Context.call(String name, AbstractNField... args)
     
    int
    Context.call(String name, Object... args)
     
    void
    Context.cancel(NChar name)
     
    protected abstract int
    AbstractProgram.procedure(AbstractNField... args)
    Defines the procedure that must be implemented by subclasses to specify the program's execution logic.
    int
    AbstractProgram.run(AbstractNField... args)
    Executes the logic of the program.

  • Uses of ContextException in com.nib.commons.esql

    Subclasses of ContextException in com.nib.commons.esql
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SqlConditionException
    SqlConditionException class extends ContextException and provides a custom exception for SQL conditions.

  • Uses of ContextException in com.nib.commons.exceptions

    Subclasses of ContextException in com.nib.commons.exceptions
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbendException
    Exception thrown to indicate an abnormal end (abend) condition in the application.
    class 
    ExitProgramException
    Exception thrown to indicate an EXIT program.
    class 
    ExitSectionException
    An exception indicating an exit from a specific section of code.
    class 
    FlowException
    An exception representing a flow control change
    class 
    GoToException
    Exception thrown to indicate a jump to a labeled position in the program flow.
    class 
    ProgramNotFoundException
    An exception indicating that a program was not found.
    class 
    StopRunException
    An exception indicating that the execution of a program should be stopped.
    class 
    StorageAllocationException
     
    class 
    VersionsMismatchException
    An exception indicating a mismatch between program and N.I.B. runtime versions.
